name: Kelly 28 leather handbag
description:
Authentic Hermès Kelly 28

Retourne Model

Color: Orange

Gulliver Leather

Gold Clasps

Hallmarked X (1994)

Eligible for the H Spa program

Comes with shoulder strap

Good overall condition. Wear on the corners.

Stains, scratches, and signs of wear are present. No holes or other major defects.

No unpleasant odor.

✅ AUTHENTICITY GUARANTEED

✨ We are not affiliated with any of the brands mentioned. All rights reserved to their respective owners. Disclaimer.

🛍️ Detailed Buyer Information

🚚 SHIPPING

Ships within 24 to 48 hours (USA only), unless otherwise stated.

A tracking number will be provided for each shipment.

📌 CONDITION OF ITEMS

All items are sold as is, and their price reflects their current condition. Each item is carefully inspected, but minor signs of wear or imperfections may not be explicitly mentioned.

♻️ PRE-OWNED ITEMS

Most items are pre-owned and may show normal signs of use, such as:

• Light scratches

• Discoloration

• Minor imperfections

Please take this into account.

📸 PHOTOS = DESCRIPTION

The photos shown are an integral part of the item description.

🔍 Examine all images carefully.

While I strive to present every detail accurately, some subtle flaws or odors may not be fully visible or may vary depending on individual perception.

🎨 COLOR VARIATIONS

Actual colors may vary slightly due to lighting or your monitor settings.

What you see on screen may not be a perfect representation of the actual item.

📩 QUESTIONS? NEED MORE PHOTOS?

Feel free to contact me!

If you would like additional information or photos, please contact me before purchasing.

📦 STORAGE AND HANDLING

The items have been carefully stored but are not new.

If you expect items to be in mint or like-new condition, please keep this in mind before purchasing.

🚫 FINAL SALE

❗All sales are final.

Please double-check your purchase before finalizing your order.

💖 THANK YOU!

Your support means a lot to us.

🌟 Happy shopping and enjoy your luxury find! 👜✨
